query:

            cbu_id, ssi_name, ssi_type,
            safekeeping_account, safekeeping_bic,
            pset_bic, status, effective_date

        VALUES ($1, 'Fallback SSI', 'SECURITIES',
                'SAFE-007', 'CITIUS33',
                'DTCYUS33', 'ACTIVE', CURRENT_DATE)
        RETURNING ssi_id
